glosses.fr: à côté de; en plus de
glosses.nb: ved siden av; i tillegg til

translations.fr: Je suis assis à côté de toi.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे बगल में बैठा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg sitter ved siden av deg.
translations.da: Jeg sidder ved siden af dig.
translations.ja: あなたの隣に座っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite form, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Preposition meaning ‘next to’; governs the dative; introduces the PP ‘neben dir’.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; object of the preposition ‘neben’.

sentences.target: Die Tasche steht neben dem Stuhl.

translations.de: Die Tasche steht neben dem Stuhl.
translations.en: The bag is next to the chair.
translations.es: La mochila está al lado de la silla.
translations.fr: Le sac est à côté de la chaise.
translations.it: La borsa è accanto alla sedia.
translations.pt: A mochila está ao lado da cadeira.
translations.vi: Cái túi ở cạnh cái ghế.
translations.nl: De tas staat naast de stoel.
translations.hu: A táska a szék mellett van.
translations.hi: बैग कुर्सी के पास रखा है.
translations.el: Η τσάντα είναι δίπλα στην καρέκλα.
translations.nb: Sekken står ved siden av stolen.
translations.id: Tas itu ada di sebelah kursi.
translations.da: Tasken står ved siden af stolen.
translations.ja: かばんが椅子の横にある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject ‘Tasche’.
Noun, feminine singular; serves as the subject.
Main verb, finite form, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition meaning ‘next to’; governs the dative; introduces the PP ‘neben dem Stuhl’.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; marks ‘Stuhl’ as object of ‘neben’.
Noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘neben’ in the dative.

sentences.target: Lea wohnt neben uns im Haus.

translations.de: Lea wohnt neben uns im Haus.
translations.en: Lea lives next to us in the building.
translations.es: Lea vive en el departamento al lado del nuestro.
translations.fr: Lea habite dans l’appartement à côté du nôtre.
translations.it: Lea abita nell’appartamento accanto al nostro.
translations.ru: Леа живёт в квартире рядом с нашей.
translations.pt: Lea mora no apartamento ao lado do nosso.
translations.tr: Lea, bizim dairenin yanındaki dairede oturuyor.
translations.vi: Lea sống ở căn hộ bên cạnh nhà mình.
translations.ar: ليا تسكن في الشقة المجاورة لشقتنا.
translations.nl: Lea woont in het appartement naast dat van ons.
translations.uk: Лея живе в квартирі поруч із нашою.
translations.hu: Lea a mellettünk lévő lakásban lakik.
translations.hi: लेया हमारे घर के बगल वाले फ्लैट में रहती है.
translations.pl: Lea mieszka w mieszkaniu obok naszego.
translations.el: Η Lea μένει στο διαμέρισμα δίπλα στο δικό μας.
translations.nb: Lea bor i leiligheten ved siden av oss.
translations.id: Lea tinggal di unit sebelah kami.
translations.sv: Lea bor i lägenheten bredvid vår.
translations.ro: Lea locuiește în apartamentul de lângă al nostru.
translations.cs: Lea bydlí v bytě vedle toho našeho.
translations.da: Lea bor i lejligheden ved siden af vores.
translations.ja: レアは同じ建物の隣の部屋に住んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; nominative subject.
Main verb, finite form, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition meaning ‘next to’; governs the dative; introduces the PP ‘neben uns’.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural dative; object of the preposition ‘neben’.
Preposition; contraction of ‘in dem’; governs the dative; introduces the PP ‘im Haus’.
Noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition ‘im’ in the dative.

sentences.target: Der Hund liegt neben dem Sofa.

translations.de: Der Hund liegt neben dem Sofa.
translations.en: The dog is lying next to the sofa.
translations.es: El perro está acostado al lado del sofá.
translations.fr: Le chien est allongé à côté du canapé.
translations.it: Il cane è sdraiato accanto al divano.
translations.pt: O cão está deitado ao lado do sofá.
translations.vi: Con chó nằm cạnh ghế sofa.
translations.nl: De hond ligt naast de bank.
translations.hu: A kutya a kanapé mellett fekszik.
translations.hi: कुत्ता सोफ़े के पास लेटा है.
translations.el: Ο σκύλος είναι ξαπλωμένος δίπλα στον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Hunden ligger ved siden av sofaen.
translations.id: Anjing itu berbaring di sebelah sofa.
translations.da: Hunden ligger ved siden af sofaen.
translations.ja: 犬がソファの横に寝そべっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject ‘Hund’.
Noun, masculine singular; subject.
Main verb, finite form, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition meaning ‘next to’; governs the dative; introduces the PP ‘neben dem Sofa’.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; marks ‘Sofa’ as object of ‘neben’.
Noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition ‘neben’ in the dative.
